text: Machine learning is a way for computers to learn from data without being explicitly programmed for every task. One common type is supervised learning. In this method, we give the computer a large set of training data. This data includes examples along with the correct answers. The computer studies these examples to create a model, which is like a set of rules or patterns it has learned. Once the model is ready, it can make predictions on new, unseen data. For example, it might predict house prices or identify spam emails. Finally, we check the model’s accuracy by comparing its predictions to the real answers to see how well it performed.
